synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2788 Oracle Linux 9 samba bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2788
description:
[0:4.22.4-12]
- Fix ERROR: talloc_free with references
- related: RHEL-143403

[0:4.22.4-11]
- Fix winbind group resolution
- resolves: RHEL-143403

[0:4.22.4-10]
- Revert samba automounter triggering fix
- reverts: RHEL-127121

[0:4.22.4-9]
- Fix samba automounter triggering
- resolves: RHEL-127121

[0:4.22.4-8]
- Remove unexpected dependency of libldb to samba

[0:4.22.4-7]
- Fix Time Machine backup
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2788

[0:4.22.4-12]
- Fix ERROR: talloc_free with references
